items.label: Development Complete — Schemas
messages: Let me directly read the existing schema files to understand patterns.
Now I have a clear picture of the existing patterns. Let me also check the tsconfig.
I now have full context on the patterns. Let me create the task schemas and tests.
Now add comprehensive tests for the task schemas:
Now append the task schema tests at the end of the test file:
Now let me build and run tests:
All 65 tests pass (including 33 new task schema tests). Build and tests are green. Let me verify the review of changes:

Review shows minimal structural impact (1% footprint), zero health degradation, no new issues. The breaking changes are from unrelated commits on the branch. My changes are clean additive schemas.  Now let me commit and complete the pipeline:

shellCommands.command: cd /workspaces/DAGent-t && bash tools/autonomous-factory/agent-commit.sh backend "feat(schemas): add TaskStatus, Task, CreateTask, UpdateTaskStatus Zod schemas for kanban board" 2>&1
cd /workspaces/DAGent-t/apps/sample-app && npm run pipeline:complete kanban-task-board-enhanced-v2 schema-dev 2>&1
